title: [Skyship, Assembly]
description: A wide area is bare of decoration with two notable exceptions.  On the grey-blue metal bulkheads, a series of banners hangs prominently.  Woven from bright threads and in pristine condition, these banners are of varying sizes and shapes.  Each banner exhibits a custom patterning of colorful pictograms, as if relying on them to tell their stories.  On the stone floor, dozens upon dozens of small, bright white circles have been painted in tight rows, each wide enough for a large individual to stand within
